title: Add session start/stop via S3 polling + batch upload
description: Extension polls S3 for session commands. On session start: begin click tracking + screenshots. On session end: batch upload clicks.json + all screenshots to S3 session folder. Add 'Session tracked' banner at top of page when active. Banner text: 'This session is tracked — you will receive a summary'. Must handle 'stop audio' flag (audio stops but click tracking continues). Upload must complete within 30s of session end.
tests: Create session in S3 -> extension detects within 2 seconds, banner appears
End session in S3 -> extension stops tracking, banner disappears, upload starts
Upload completes within 30s for a 15-minute session (~90 clicks + screenshots)
Banner is visible but not intrusive (small bar at top, can be dismissed)
No tracking occurs when no active session exists
Extension survives page navigation during active session
notes: Marked complete - code verified in repo on main branch
